analysis.executive_summary: Audit of developers.fireblocks.com covered 267 pages (100% crawl coverage of 293 discovered URLs). Documentation contains 24 confirmed broken internal links affecting user-facing docs. API reference coverage is critically low at 0.69% despite 142 API pages detected. Example code reliability is 0% with SEO/metadata issues affecting 20.97% of pages. Overall audit confidence is 88.42%.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage achieved (100% of 293 in-scope pages)
High freshness coverage with last-updated metadata present on 99.25% of pages
risks: 24 confirmed broken internal links in user-facing documentation degrade navigation and user trust
API reference coverage at 0.69% indicates virtually no usage examples, tutorials, or guides for 142 detected API pages
Example code reliability at 0% suggests no working code samples, blocking developer onboarding
SEO/metadata issues on 20.97% of pages harm discoverability and search ranking
2 links unverified due to auth/rate-limit/server blocks may hide additional broken links
Low API confidence (85%) and links confidence (87.31%) indicate potential undetected issues
Gap between 293 requested and 267 crawled pages (26 pages) suggests access or rendering problems

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 24 confirmed broken internal links in user-facing documentation
Create usage examples and integration guides for the 142 API pages to raise coverage from 0.69% to minimum 40%
Implement working code examples with validation to address 0% example reliability
Audit and fix SEO/metadata issues affecting 20.97% of pages (56 pages)
Investigate 2 unverified links and 26-page crawl gap to ensure complete documentation access

limitations: External audit cannot verify content accuracy, technical correctness, or whether API documentation matches actual API behavior
2 links blocked by auth/rate-limit/server restrictions could not be verified; actual broken link count may be higher
Example code reliability detection may not capture all runtime failures, dependency issues, or environment-specific problems
Crawl gap of 26 pages may indicate authentication-gated content, JavaScript rendering issues, or dynamic pages not accessible to auditor
API coverage detection relies on heuristics; actual developer experience with integration guides may differ from measured 0.69%
